_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Trainline Partner Solutions
listings.description: Trainline Partner Solutions is the B2B distribution arm of Trainline, providing rail and coach ticketing content to travel agencies, OTAs, and corporate travel platforms across Europe. It aggregates fares from multiple rail operators into a single API.

listings.name: Rail Europe
listings.description: Rail Europe is a rail ticket distributor aggregating fares from European train operators for international travelers and travel agents, offering multi-country rail passes and point-to-point tickets. It also serves B2B travel trade partners through dedicated APIs.
usps: Specialist in cross-border European rail passes

listings.name: SilverRail Technologies
listings.description: SilverRail Technologies provides rail distribution and retailing technology connecting rail operators to online travel agencies and global distribution systems. Now part of Expedia Group's B2B network, it enables rail content to be sold alongside flights and hotels.

listings.name: Distribusion Technologies
listings.description: Distribusion is a ground transportation distribution platform aggregating bus, rail, and shuttle content from operators worldwide, connecting them to OTAs, airlines, and travel marketplaces via API. It focuses on making intercity ground transport bookable alongside flights.

listings.name: Omio B2B
listings.description: Omio's B2B arm provides rail, bus, and flight content aggregation as an API for third-party travel platforms, leveraging the same multi-modal search technology behind Omio's consumer app. It focuses on European ground transport connectivity for partners.

listings.name: RailClick
listings.description: RailClick is a B2B rail booking platform providing travel agents access to European rail fares and reservations, aggregating content from national rail operators into a single agent-facing tool. It targets travel agencies needing rail alongside air and hotel bookings.

listings.name: 12Go
listings.description: 12Go is a Southeast Asia-focused multi-modal transport booking platform aggregating bus, train, ferry, and flight content across the region, serving both direct travelers and B2B travel partners. It is a key ground transport distribution player in emerging Asian markets.
usps: Dominant ground transport aggregator in Southeast Asia
Broad ferry and rural bus network coverage

listings.name: Rail Ninja
listings.description: Rail Ninja is an online rail ticket booking platform focused on international travelers booking train journeys in Asia, Europe, and other regions, aggregating fares and simplifying booking for non-local rail systems. It targets tourists needing English-language rail booking support.
usps: Tourist-friendly booking for complex rail systems

listings.name: Loco2
listings.description: Loco2 is a European train ticket booking platform that aggregates fares across multiple national rail operators for cross-border journeys, historically popular with independent and eco-conscious travelers avoiding flights. It has been integrated into Trainline's broader booking network.
usps: Early mover in cross-border rail-only booking

listings.name: Trainline
listings.description: Trainline is a leading consumer rail and coach ticketing app in Europe, aggregating fares from national and regional operators into a single app for UK and international rail travel. It also operates a growing B2B distribution business alongside its consumer platform.
usps: Leading consumer rail app in UK/Europe
Large combined rail and coach network

listings.name: Renfe Distribution API
listings.description: Renfe, Spain's national rail operator, offers a distribution API allowing travel agencies and OTAs to sell Spanish high-speed and regional rail tickets directly. It is a key content source for aggregators covering the Iberian rail market.
usps: Direct access to Spain's national rail operator
Essential content source for Iberian rail aggregators

listings.name: TrainPal
listings.description: TrainPal is a rail ticket booking app aggregating UK and select international rail fares, offering fare comparison and split-ticketing to help travelers find cheaper journeys. It competes with Trainline in the UK consumer rail booking space.
usps: Competitive alternative to Trainline in the UK

listings.name: RailEasy
listings.description: RailEasy is a UK rail ticket retailer aggregating national rail operator fares for online booking, offering journey planning and e-ticket delivery for domestic UK train travel. It serves as an independent alternative ticket-selling channel in the UK rail market.
usps: Focus on domestic UK commuter and leisure rail

listings.name: Wanderu
listings.description: Wanderu is a North American bus and train search engine aggregating fares from multiple ground transport operators, allowing travelers to compare and book intercity journeys in one place. It also licenses its search technology to partner sites.
usps: Leading bus/rail comparison engine in North America
Broad North American ground operator coverage

listings.name: Trainu
listings.description: Trainu is a rail booking and aggregation service focused on European train fares, providing travelers with fare comparison across multiple national operators and optional curated rail tour packages for independent and group travel.
usps: Combines fare aggregation with curated rail tour packages
Flexible independent and group traveler options
Growing niche in guided rail tourism
